_note: Phase 5 Track B, Stage 3: RL-lite (filtered/reward-weighted BC + vector-field anchor to the frozen pi_0^L10) on libero_10, AFTER the demo-seed remedy lifted pi_0^L10 off the 0% zero-shot floor to ~44%. THE MEASUREMENT: does libero_10 success rise DURABLY across RL iterations, or redistribute within noise (the Phase-4 Goal pattern)? collection==eval (rollout binary success == lerobot pc_success), per-task single-proc, paired on seeds 1000+ across iterations. COMPLETE: pi_0 -> pi_1 -> pi_2 (2 outer iters; early-stopped on the iter-2 regression).
status: COMPLETE (2 outer iterations; early-stopped on regression per plan)
headline: COMPOUNDING FALSIFIED. Trajectory pi_0 44.0 -> pi_1 47.5 -> pi_2 42.5 (paired n=200) = a within-noise bump then a return to (slightly below) baseline. The iter-1 +3.5 did NOT compound; iter-2 erased it (-5.0). The exact tasks that gained in iter-1 cratered in iter-2 (t3 60->75->55, t7 25->40->25, t4 10->20->10, t5 80->85->70) = redistribution / regression-to-mean, not a durable RL effect. This is the SAME result as the saturated Goal suite (89.0->91.0->89.4), now established on the UNSATURATED, demo-seeded libero_10 too -> a stronger, more general null.
verdict: RL-lite (filtered/reward-weighted BC + vf-beta anchor) on a flow-matching VLA (SmolVLA) produces NO durable success gain -- only within-noise redistribution -- in BOTH regimes tested: saturated in-distribution (Goal, 89%) AND unsaturated demo-seeded OOD (libero_10, ~44%). The up-then-down 3-point trajectory is itself the evidence the bump was noise (same logic that falsified Goal compounding). The contribution is the methodology + an honest map of where RL-lite can/can't move the policy + the marginal-task rescue-then-reversal mechanism.
method: Per outer iteration: collect rollouts of the current policy in LIBERO (n=20/task, n_envs=4, relative control, n_action_steps=10, rename_map image->camera1/2, MUJOCO_GL=egl) -> filter to successes (+ time-to-success weight, mean-1 normalized) -> reward-weighted flow-matching BC fine-tune with a vf-beta=10 anchor to the FROZEN pi_0^L10 (design sec 3b; anchor held FIXED across all iters, sft_pm=rl_base_l10) -> repeat. collection==eval: the rollout success predicate equals lerobot pc_success, so each iter's collection IS that policy's per-task eval, paired on seeds 1000+ (same initial states across iters).
hardware: Finetunes: pi_0->pi_1 on A100-80GB (~9 min); pi_1->pi_2 on L4 High-RAM (~14 min). Collections: both on L4 High-RAM (56.9 GB), 2 sequential single-proc groups [0-4],[5-9], ~5.5-6 h each. (A100/L4 for the GPU-bound finetune; L4 for the sim-bound rollouts. iter-2 collection completed autonomously via Pro+ background-exec through a monitoring-session disconnect -- blocking-cell + Drive-checkpointing robustness.)

iter2_pi1_to_pi2._note: drift 1.125 ~ iter-1's 1.119 -> beta=10 gives a consistent per-iteration step size. r_vf nonzero from step 1 (live=pi_1 already drifted from the frozen pi_0^L10 anchor, unlike iter-1 where live==frozen at step 0).

pi2_minus_pi1._what: the compounding test: iter-1 gains REVERSED -> falsified

pi2_minus_pi0._what: net after 2 iters: ~back to baseline (within noise)

reference_pi0_sft_eval_n10._note: Stage-1 SFT eval (n=10/task, DIFFERENT seeds) -- noisier, not the paired baseline; the paired iter-0 (44.0) is the rigorous SFT->RL reference.

interpretation: iter-1 produced a marginal-task-rescue bump (+3.5), concentrated on headroom tasks that pi_0 seeded with >=a few successes (t3,t4,t7) -- the kind of effect the saturated Goal suite had less room to show. But iter-2 ERASED it: the same tasks reversed (t3 -20, t7 -15, t5 -15, t4 -10), landing pi_2 at 42.5 (-1.5 vs pi_0). The 3-point up-then-down trajectory + the per-task reversal == regression-to-mean / stochastic redistribution, NOT a durable learned gain. t8 stayed starved (0->0->10; the iter-2 '10' is 2/20 rollout luck on those seeds, not a bootstrap, since pi_1 had 0 t8 successes to imitate). Net: RL-lite does not durably move libero_10 success, mirroring Goal.
confounds: Single seed-set (seeds 1000+, paired across iters) -> seed-specific luck not averaged out. Claim-grade needs >=3 seeds (kickoff sec 10); BUT the up-then-down trajectory + per-task reversal already read as noise (same standard that falsified Goal compounding).
n=20/task -> per-task binomial CI ~+/-20; overall n=200 SE ~3.5 -> the +3.5 (iter-1) and -5.0 (iter-2) overall swings are ~1-1.5 SE (within noise).
beta=10 single value, not the {0,1,10,30} sweep (scoped to libero_10's slow render).
Sim-only, outcome-only binary success; t8 fully starved (0 pi_0/pi_1 successes -> filtered BC cannot bootstrap) -- the realized sec-8 starvation for the single hardest task even post-demo-seed.
next: Optional claim-grade extension (kickoff sec 10): repeat with >=3 seeds (vary RL-train + eval seeds) to put a CI on the ~flat delta -- tens of hours on libero_10's slow render. Not run: the dual-suite null (Goal + libero_10) is already a coherent, defensible finding. The honest writeup leads with the null + the methodology + the where-RL-can/can't-move-it map.
